title: #ia #ai #iavideo
prompt_text: A surreal and comedic indoor scene transitioning from a dinner setting to a bizarre character reveal. Initially, a perfectly roasted chicken sits on a garnished platter on a rustic wooden dining table. The table is set with plates, greens, and a knife block in a warm, domestic kitchen or dining room. As the video progresses, the roasted chicken miraculously transforms and 'hatches' into a living, anthropomorphic rooster with an incredibly muscular, bodybuilder-like physique. The rooster-man wears red ruffled pants and has feathered skin that retains a glisten similar to roasted poultry. The background features a soft-focus interior with a window and home decor, illuminated by natural daylight.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A surreal and comedic indoor scene transitioning from a dinner setting to a bizarre character reveal. Initially, a perfectly roasted chicken sits on a garnished platter on a rustic wooden dining table. The table is set with plates, greens, and a knife block in a warm, domestic kitchen or dining room. As the video progresses, the roasted chicken miraculously transforms and 'hatches' into a living, anthropomorphic rooster with an incredibly muscular, bodybuilder-like physique. The rooster-man wears red ruffled pants and has feathered skin that retains a glisten similar to roasted poultry. The background features a soft-focus interior with a window and home decor, illuminated by natural daylight.

cinematography.cameraShot: Medium close-up, starting with a static shot of the food and transitioning into a slow tracking shot that follows the character as it stands and turns.

actions: The video begins with a static shot of a roasted chicken on a platter.
A rooster's head suddenly emerges from the neck area of the roasted chicken and lets out a crow.
The 'roasted' body of the chicken stands up, revealing a muscular, human-like torso and legs wearing red pants.
The anthropomorphic rooster character steps off the plate onto the wooden table.
The character turns its back to the camera, flexing its muscular, feathered back and shoulders while walking away.
dialogue: A loud, classic rooster crowing sound (Cock-a-doodle-doo).
A rhythmic, energetic shouting of numbers: 'One! Two! Three!'
Ambient kitchen sounds and upbeat, fast-paced background music.
